extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports against-vs-by rows separately: all criminal cells are NIL, so criminal proceedings against all listed entities are 0; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, Directors, Promoters, KMP and SMP are NIL, so regulatory actions against are 0; the tax column shows 1 against the Company and 1 against Promoters, but only the Company row is counted for the company/subsidiary tax field, giving 1.
